Subject: Re: LNG/C " HILLI " AT PENUELAS, PUERTO RICO .
Message: Dan, I need to send to FERC, Mr. Bob Arvelund, the schedule of the LNG ships for June, July and August.  He needs this information to schedule his visit and inspection of the LNG terminal and storage operations.  With the late arrival of the "Hilli" your earlier schedule may not be valid any more.  Do you have a revised schedule on hand I could e-mail to him?
